Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "WORRON-0834" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Worron.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the STA $DC00 instruction at $0885 to jump to our own input handling routine at $07BC so that any key can exit the title screen, not just the space bar.
